characters.appearance: A human hand with fair skin and a neatly trimmed fingernail on the index finger.

scenes.supernova_script:
Narrator says: English बोलने में डर लगता है? Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Scared of speaking English? Practice daily with Supernova.]
App Voice says: equal - समान [equal - same]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common fear of speaking English.
- Introduces Supernova as a daily practice solution.
- Demonstrates the core app mechanic of tapping a word to learn its meaning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PRACTICE ENGLISH FOR 10 MINUTES A DAY
—All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others.
equal
[i'kwəl]
समान
I know it
Learn

scenes.supernova_script:
Narrator says: हमारी कहानियों और AI tutor के साथ, नए words सीखना बहुत आसान है। [With our stories and AI tutor, learning new words is very easy.]
App Voice says: slowly - धीरे से [slowly - slowly]
Narrator says: पढ़ते हुए कोई word समझ ना आए? बस उसपे tap करो। [Don't understand a word while reading? Just tap on it.]
App Voice says: cold - ठंडा [cold - cold]
Narrator says: उसका सही pronunciation और Hindi meaning तुरंत सुनो। [Hear its correct pronunciation and Hindi meaning instantly.]
App Voice says: tried - कोशिश की [tried - tried]
Narrator says: रटना छोड़ो, और real-world situations में English बोलना सीखो। [Stop mugging up, and learn to speak English in real-world situations.]
App Voice says: word - शब्द [word - word]
Narrator says: चाहे interview हो या दोस्तों से बात करनी हो, Supernova आपका पूरा साथ देगा। [Whether it's an interview or talking to friends, Supernova will fully support you.]
App Voice says: something - कुछ [something - something]
Narrator says: रोज़ नए words सीखो और अपनी vocabulary strong बनाओ। [Learn new words daily and make your vocabulary strong.]
App Voice says: farm - खेत [farm - farm]
Narrator says: गलतियों से मत घबराओ, आपका AI tutor हमेशा मदद के लिए है। [Don't be afraid of mistakes, your AI tutor is always there to help.]
App Voice says: always - हमेशा [always - always]
Narrator says: आज ही Supernova app से अपनी English journey शुरू करो! [Start your English journey with the Supernova app today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the practical benefits of the app features (AI tutor, pronunciation, Hindi meanings).
- Encourages the user by removing the fear of mistakes and rote memorization.
- Connects the learning to real-world goals like interviews and socializing.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PRACTICE ENGLISH FOR 10 MINUTES A DAY
ANIMAL FARM
GEORGE ORWELL
—read one of them slowly. The animals remained in silence in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old word, but something didn't fit. Nobody said anything. The farm seemed the same as always, and even so, nothing was the same again.
slowly
cold
tried
word
something
farm
always
I know it
Learn
